archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Adapted for high-end hardware emulation)

motion_interactions.key_press: scale down 0.95 with 50ms duration, subtle opacity fade
motion_interactions.haptic_feedback: light vibration on every key press to simulate physical buttons

display_screen.description: The main LCD area. Classic mode mimics a physical LCD with a greenish background and dark pixelated text. Modern mode uses an obsidian dark background with crisp white text. Both must display stack indicators (X, Y, Z, T) or operation states.

keypad_grid.description: 5-column grid for portrait layout. Groups financial keys (N, I, PV, PMT, FV) at the top row. Numpad at the bottom right. Must support absolute positioned f/g secondary functions around the main keys.

calculator_key.description: Individual key component. Props needed: mainLabel, fLabel (top text), gLabel (bottom text), variant (numpad, function, enter, f, g). Needs contrasting styles based on theme.

history_panel.description: Modal or bottom drawer showing previous calculations. Portuguese title 'Histórico'.

memory_display.description: Persistent area or modal displaying the storage registers (R0-R9, financial registers). Portuguese title 'Memória'.

toggle_controls.description: Top or bottom bar switches for Mode (RPN/ALG) and Theme (Clássico/Moderno).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use StyleSheet in React Native to implement the color tokens and typography since it's an Expo app. If using NativeWind, map these to the tailwind config.
For Classic theme fidelity: The 'f' modifier label (gold/yellow) must be positioned slightly above the main key text. The 'g' modifier label (blue) must be positioned below the main key text.
Portuguese Localization required: 'Histórico' (History), 'Memória' (Memory), 'Alternar Tema' (Theme Toggle), 'RPN / ALG' (Mode Toggle).

Layout strategy for portrait: Break the classic 4x10 hardware grid into a mobile-friendly 5x8 vertical layout. Ensure the iconic financial keys (n, i, PV, PMT, FV) span the top row exactly as they do on the physical calculator.
Ensure 'CHS' and 'EEX' keys are adjacent to the numpad, and the 'ENTER' key is prominently styled.
Classic theme must include skeuomorphic details: A metallic/champagne colored bezel around the display and subtle shadow gradients on keys.
Modern theme should strip skeuomorphism: Use deep obsidian blacks (#050505), flat neumorphic buttons, and subtle white glow on text.
Include haptic feedback (Haptics API) on button presses to recreate the satisfying mechanical 'click' of the physical HP 12C.
